items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the outcome of the simulated persona scenario 'Auto-scaling under load'. While the expected result mentions that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there is no actual evidence or results from the simulation to support this. Therefore, the validation of this exploratory step is inconclusive.
